allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix instructor availability calendar to show scheduled classes

- Add useInstructorClasses and useInstructorAvailability hooks to AvailabilityView
- Pass scheduledClasses prop from InstructorPortal to AvailabilityView
- Scheduled classes now display as blue circles on the calendar
- Available dates display as green circles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix instructor availability calendar to show scheduled classes

- Add useInstructorClasses and useInstructorAvailability hooks to AvailabilityView
- Pass scheduledClasses prop from InstructorPortal to AvailabilityView
- Scheduled classes now display as blue circles on the calendar
- Available dates display as green circles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/gerog/Documents/cpr-jun21-dev" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix organization invoices - remove obsolete invoice_id mapping

Backend now returns ''id'' directly, so the mapping that tried to
convert invoice_id to id was causing undefined values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd C:/Users/gerog/Documents/cpr-jun21-dev && npm test 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "Cannot find module")

Bash(rm -rf /c/Users/gerog/Documents/cpr-jun21-dev/backend/node_modules/undici && cd /c/Users/gerog/Documents/cpr-jun21-dev && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --ignore-scripts 2>&1 | tail -5 && cat backend/node_modules/undici/package.json | grep '"version"')
